name: nutritionEstimate
invariants: output.ok === false || (output.result.macros && typeof output.result.macros.protein === 'string' && typeof output.result.macros.fat === 'string' && typeof output.result.macros.carbs === 'string')
_note: cooking.nutritionEstimate sums per-100g nutrient averages over a small ingredient db (flour/sugar/butter/egg/milk/chicken/rice/oil/cheese/potato), scaled by grams, then divides by servings (defaults 1). Unmatched ingredients contribute zero (degrade-graceful). Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro; tolerates the double-wrapped { artifact: { data } } client body. Estimates only — never claims authoritative nutrition (usda-search / recipe-nutrition-compute are the real-data paths). No DB/network, never throws. Pinned by server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js.
